title: Adam episode 15
wikitext:
[]: Adam (episode 15)             Quote Post by Guy » Fri Mar 07, 2008 7:09 pm in the beginning of episode 15 gendo says seele shouldnt be worrying cause adam is fine....why would that reassure seele if hes not even supposed to have adam?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 07, 2008 7:25 pm Maybe at the time, SEELE thought the giant on the cross was Adam. There seems to be a lot of confusion among some of the characters as to who the white giant is. (I.e., Kaji, Misato, Kaworu). It's hard to say if they actually knew who the giant was. Gendo did keep SEELE in the dark about a lot of things.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 07, 2008 10:48 pm It would be sort of weird if Seele didn't know who the giant was, since they funded (and presumably oversaw in some capacity) the operations to dig her up in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 08, 2008 5:02 am lol plotholes

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 08, 2008 5:29 am The Adam/Lilith mix-up is one of the stupider and more poorly-implemented plot devices in the show. It's there, it creates confusion, but ultimately it doesn't seem to be much worth it, because once the audience knows who is supposed to be who the contrivances used to set it up don't go away and never adequately justify their own existences.

[]:             Quote Post by ungenesis » Sat Mar 08, 2008 2:21 pm ...which is probably why they skip the whole thing in Rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 08, 2008 2:43 pm Reichu wrote: The Adam/Lilith mix-up is one of the stupider and more poorly-implemented plot devices in the show. It's there, it creates confusion, but ultimately it doesn't seem to be much worth it, because once the audience knows who is supposed to be who the contrivances used to set it up don't go away and never adequately justify their own existences.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Mar 08, 2008 3:50 pm Xard wrote: They already know/have hunch that Adam was smuggled to Gendo. Thus it is natural for him to go "nah I'm following your plan k?" OH SHI- That contradicts what Kaji said in Ep 21 ------------------- Maybe they did know it was smuggled but didn't know it was Kaji? Yay, it makes sense!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 08, 2008 4:36 pm Zugzwang wrote: Isn't the reason Kaji was killed was for diverting the Adam sample that was in Germany to Gendo? They must have figured out it was Kaji who did that at some point then.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Mar 08, 2008 7:29 pm Oh, was thinking of the line just after that in episode #21 - [code:1]Kaji: I just want to get closer to the truth within myself. Besides, it looks like they'll find out that I diverted the sample of Adam to Commander Ikari, so I have to guard my own interests too, or various bad things will happen.[/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 08, 2008 7:35 pm Well, that too, but what I was getting at is that Kaji was supposed to be Seele's bell, except the bell never worked, so they got rid of the bell.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Mar 09, 2008 1:33 am I always thought the whole Adam thing was an over contrived codename to keep certain things secret. Everyone at NERV knew about Adam but Lilith was a secret. I don't really see the point but then I'm not an uber paranoid zealot that wants to create a perfect being or some such BS.

[]:             Quote Post by evilhead008 » Mon Mar 31, 2008 4:12 pm OH SHI-

There seems to be a lot of confusion among some of the characters as to who the white giant is. (I.e., Kaji, Misato, Kaworu). It's hard to say if they actually knew who the giant was. Gendo did keep SEELE in the dark about a lot of things.
